What is the Meme Force?

The Meme Force is the united front of CT's greatest meme warriors — Pepe, Wojak, WIF, Pudgy under the control of Toly and Vitalik Buterin. No single hero, one Force. Born on May the 4th, forged on Solana.

Pepe

Put on jedi robes.

Wojak

Grabbed a lightsaber.

WIF

Suited up. Hat still on.

Pudgy

Chose violence.

Toly

Controls the chain speed.

Vitalik

Looks cool. Says less.

The Force Is Not a Token. It's a Movement.

The Meme Force is what happens when every legend on the timeline stops fighting for attention and starts fighting together.

  • ▸Pepe put on jedi robes.
  • ▸Wojak grabbed a lightsaber.
  • ▸WIF suited up. Hat still on.
  • ▸Pudgy chose violence.
  • ▸@VitalikButerin and @toly are just looking cool.
  • ▸They all showed up on the same day, on the same chain.
  • ▸Born on May the 4th, forged on Solana.
